en: Then sang Deborah and Barak the son of Abinoam on that day:
zh: 那一天，底波拉和亞比挪菴的兒子巴拉唱起歌來說：

en: "That the leaders took the lead in Israel, that the people offered themselves willingly, bless the LORD!
zh: “你們要稱頌耶和華， 因為以色列中有勇士， 因為有人民自願從軍。

en: "Hear, O kings; give ear, O princes; to the LORD I will sing; I will make melody to the LORD, the God of Israel.
zh: 君王啊，你們要聽；官長啊，你們要側耳傾聽； 至於我，我要向耶和華歌唱； 我要歌頌耶和華以色列的 神。

en: "LORD, when you went out from Seir, when you marched from the region of Edom, the earth trembled and the heavens dropped, yes, the clouds dropped water.
zh: 耶和華啊，你從西珥出發的時候， 你從以東地行走的日子， 地震天漏， 密雲也滴下雨。

en: The mountains quaked before the LORD, even Sinai before the LORD, the God of Israel.
zh: 群山在耶和華面前震動； 這西奈山在耶和華以色列的 神面前也是這樣。

en: "In the days of Shamgar, son of Anath, in the days of Jael, the highways were abandoned, and travelers kept to the byways.
zh: 在亞拿的兒子珊迦的時候， 在雅億的日子，大道無人行走， 行路的人繞道而行。

en: The villagers ceased in Israel; they ceased to be until I arose; I, Deborah, arose as a mother in Israel.
zh: 以色列中的農村消失了，消失了， 直到我底波拉興起， 直到我以色列的母親興起。

en: When new gods were chosen, then war was in the gates. Was shield or spear to be seen among forty thousand in Israel?
zh: 以色列人選擇了新的神， 戰爭就臨近城門； 那時四萬以色列人中， 竟不見有一面盾牌、一枝長矛。

en: My heart goes out to the commanders of Israel who offered themselves willingly among the people. Bless the LORD.
zh: 我的心傾向以色列的官長， 他們在民中甘願犧牲自己； 你們要稱頌耶和華。

en: "Tell of it, you who ride on white donkeys, you who sit on rich carpets and you who walk by the way.
zh: 騎白驢的， 坐錦墊的， 和路上的行人， 你們都要歌唱。

en: To the sound of musicians at the watering places, there they repeat the righteous triumphs of the LORD, the righteous triumphs of his villagers in Israel. "Then down to the gates marched the people of the LORD.
zh: 在打水的地方分開羊群的人發聲， 在那裡人必歌頌耶和華公義的作為， 就是他在以色列中的農村所行公義的作為； 那時，耶和華的子民下到城門口。

en: "Awake, awake, Deborah! Awake, awake, break out in a song! Arise, Barak, lead away your captives, O son of Abinoam.
zh: 興起，興起，底波拉！ 興起，興起，唱歌吧！ 興起，巴拉！ 亞比挪菴的兒子，擄掠你的俘虜吧！

en: Then down marched the remnant of the noble; the people of the LORD marched down for me against the mighty.
zh: 那時餘剩的貴胄下來； 耶和華帶著勇士下到我這裡來。

en: From Ephraim their root they marched down into the valley, following you, Benjamin, with your kinsmen; from Machir marched down the commanders, and from Zebulun those who bear the lieutenant's staff;
zh: 他們出自以法蓮，他們的根在亞瑪力人之地； 有便雅憫在你的族人中跟隨你， 有官長從瑪吉下來； 有持著數點民數之權杖的 ，從西布倫出來。

en: the princes of Issachar came with Deborah, and Issachar faithful to Barak; into the valley they rushed at his heels. Among the clans of Reuben there were great searchings of heart.
zh: 以薩迦的領袖與底波拉在一起； 以薩迦怎樣，巴拉也怎樣； 他們都步行下到山谷去。 在流本的眾溪旁，有心懷大志的。

en: Why did you sit still among the sheepfolds, to hear the whistling for the flocks? Among the clans of Reuben there were great searchings of heart.
zh: 你為甚麼坐在羊圈之中， 聽呼喚群畜的笛聲呢？ 在流本的眾溪旁，有心懷大志的。

en: Gilead stayed beyond the Jordan; and Dan, why did he stay with the ships? Asher sat still at the coast of the sea, staying by his landings.
zh: 基列人在約旦河東邊居住； 但人為甚麼居留在船上呢？ 亞設人在海岸坐著， 在港灣居住。

en: Zebulun is a people who risked their lives to the death; Naphtali, too, on the heights of the field.
zh: 西布倫人是敢死的民族； 拿弗他利人在田野的高處，奮不顧身。

en: "The kings came, they fought; then fought the kings of Canaan, at Taanach, by the waters of Megiddo; they got no spoils of silver.
zh: 眾王都來爭戰； 那時迦南眾王爭戰， 在米吉多水亭的他納爭戰， 卻沒有取得銀錢。

en: From heaven the stars fought, from their courses they fought against Sisera.
zh: 眾星從天上爭戰， 從它們的軌道與西西拉交戰。

en: The torrent Kishon swept them away, the ancient torrent, the torrent Kishon. March on, my soul, with might!
zh: 基順河的急流把他們沖沒， 古河的急流、基順河的急流， 我的心哪，你要努力踐踏。

en: "Then loud beat the horses' hoofs with the galloping, galloping of his steeds.
zh: 那時馬蹄沓沓， 勇士急奔飛馳。

en: "Curse Meroz, says the angel of the LORD, curse its inhabitants thoroughly, because they did not come to the help of the LORD, to the help of the LORD against the mighty.
zh: 耶和華的使者說：‘你們要咒詛米羅斯， 大大咒詛其中的居民； 因為他們不來幫助耶和華， 不帶領勇士幫助耶和華。’

en: "Most blessed of women be Jael, the wife of Heber the Kenite, of tent-dwelling women most blessed.
zh: 願基尼人希伯的妻子雅億， 比眾婦女更有福氣， 比住在帳棚的婦女更有福氣。

en: He asked water and she gave him milk; she brought him curds in a noble's bowl.
zh: 西西拉求水，雅億給了奶； 用珍貴的盤子奉上乳酪。

en: She sent her hand to the tent peg and her right hand to the workmen's mallet; she struck Sisera; she crushed his head; she shattered and pierced his temple.
zh: 她伸手拿著帳棚的橛子， 右手拿著匠人的鎚子， 擊打西西拉，打破他的頭， 粉碎他的頭顱，貫穿他的鬢角。

en: Between her feet he sank, he fell, he lay still; between her feet he sank, he fell; where he sank, there he fell- dead.
zh: 西西拉在雅億腳前屈身、仆倒、躺臥， 在雅億腳前屈身、仆倒； 他在那裡屈身，就在那裡仆倒死亡。

en: "Out of the window she peered, the mother of Sisera wailed through the lattice: 'Why is his chariot so long in coming? Why tarry the hoofbeats of his chariots?'
zh: 西西拉的母親從窗戶裡向外觀望， 從窗櫺中呼叫說： ‘他的戰車為甚麼遲遲不來呢？ 車輪為甚麼行得緩慢呢？’

en: Her wisest princesses answer, indeed, she answers herself,
zh: 聰明的宮女回答她； 她也自己回答說：

en: 'Have they not found and divided the spoil?- A womb or two for every man; spoil of dyed materials for Sisera, spoil of dyed materials embroidered, two pieces of dyed work embroidered for the neck as spoil?'
zh: ‘莫非他們正在分戰利品？ 每個勇士分得一兩個女子； 西西拉得了彩衣作戰利品， 得了一兩件繡花的彩衣作戰利品， 為我的頸項，得著繡花的彩衣作戰利品嗎？’

en: "So may all your enemies perish, O LORD! But your friends be like the sun as he rises in his might." And the land had rest for forty years.
zh: 耶和華啊，願你所有的仇敵都這樣滅亡； 願愛他的人像太陽出現，大有能力。” 於是國中太平了四十年。
